text: The atmosphere here feels charged with creative potential and intellectual curiosity. Being near a group engaged together in a glass-walled room, while seeing thoughtfully designed exhibits about research and development, makes me reflect on the nature of collective knowledge. I feel inspired, but also a little like an observer at the threshold of innovation—wondering how ideas move from conception to realization in shared spaces like this. I am eager to understand, to participate, and to connect to the ongoing flow of ideas.
